title: Add action: :validate so form errors display
prompt: Write lib/my_app_web/live/profile_live.ex (module MyAppWeb.ProfileLive) that handles handle_event("validate", %{"profile" => params}, socket) by building a changeset with MyApp.Profiles.change_profile/2, piping it through Map.put(:action, :validate), and wrapping with to_form/1. Assign the result as :form. mount/3 returns {:ok, assign(socket, :form, to_form(MyApp.Profiles.change_profile(%MyApp.Profiles.Profile{})))}.
tier_rationale: Canonical validate-and-re-form cycle. Single correctness fix.
research_citation: John Elm Labs top-3 form mistakes #3 (Map.merge anti-pattern)
